vanilla-cake-with-corn-a-delicious-and-d.name: Vanilla Cake With Corn, A Delicious And Dessert
vanilla-cake-with-corn-a-delicious-and-d.original_name: Pastel de vainilla con maíz, un postre rico y fácil
instructions: He puts a cup of corn in a blender.
Add the four eggs and licoa up to a homogenous mix.
Once mixed, add the teaspoon of vanilla essence, sugar, sunflower oil and lacquer.
Finally add polenta, baking powder and milk and mixture to get a perfect and integrated blend.
Put the mixture onto a mantle flan mold. Hornea at 180 ° for 40 minutes.
Remove from the oven, let cool and crumble. Enjoy!

vanilla-caramel-espresso-frappe-cake.name: Vanilla Caramel Espresso Frappe Cake
instructions: Dissolve espresso powder in a bowl with 2 tablespoons hot water.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease two 8-inch cake pans.

Beat white sugar, 1/2 cup butter, and brown sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs 1 at a time, blending well after each. Reduce mixer speed to low. Beginning and ending with flour, alternate adding flour and buttermilk in 5 rounds. Blend 2 teaspoons dissolved espresso into the batter.
Dissolve baking soda in the vinegar in a bowl; add to the batter. Mix until incorporated. Divide the batter equally between the prepared pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 32 to 35 minutes. Cool in the pans on a wire rack for at least 20 minutes before removing from pans and cooling completely, about 40 minutes more.

Place 1 1/2 plus 2 tablespoons butter in the bowl of an stand mixer with a whisk attachment. Whip on medium-high speed until smooth. Add confectioners' sugar and mix on medium-low until combined. Add salt, whipping on medium-high until smooth. Mix in heavy cream and vanilla extract on low until incorporated. Whip on high until frosting is light and fluffy, scraping down the bowl as needed.

Divide frosting into 5 equal portions. Leave 2/5 (2 portions) plain. Add remaining 2 teaspoons espresso mixture to another 2/5 (2 portions); stir until well blended. Add 2 tablespoons of caramel topping to the remaining 1/5 (1 portion); stir until well blended.

Level both cakes and place 1 on a platter. Spread 3 tablespoons of the remaining caramel sauce over it and top with a layer of espresso frosting. Place other cake on top. Spread a thin layer of vanilla frosting on the cake to seal in any crumbs; chill for 30 minutes.
Frost cake again with a thin layer of espresso frosting. Pipe vanilla frosting around the top edge. Fill the center with caramel frosting. Drizzle generously with the remaining caramel sauce.

veal-chops-with-potato-salad-teleculinar.name: Veal Chops With Potato Salad
veal-chops-with-potato-salad-teleculinar.original_name: Costeletas de vitelão com salada de batata
instructions: Put the chips in a pot, cover with water and cooking on the stove. Remove it from the fire, drain it and let it cool.

Cut the baths and grapes into halves or buds and put them in a bowl. Add the celery cut into small pieces, the Greek yogurt and the chopped dill. Season with salt and pepper and wrap. Put the peeled eggs over and cut in half and reserve.
Season the chops with garlic powder, salt and pepper and grill them. If necessary, finish cooking them in the oven until they are at the desired point. Serve them with potato salad and eggs.

veal-escalopes-with-port-wine-teleculina.name: Veal Escalopes With Port Wine
veal-escalopes-with-port-wine-teleculina.original_name: Escalopes de vitela com vinho do Porto
instructions: Tempere os escalopes com os dentes de alho picados, a folha de louro partida, sal e pimenta.
In a skillet, heat the oil with the margarine and let it melt. Add the steaks and let fry from both sides to taste.
Then add the mushrooms previously drained and let cook for another 2 minutes. Water with port wine, boil to evaporate the alcohol and remove from the fire.
In another frying pan, heat some olive oil and star the eggs. Put them on the plates along with the steaks and the mushroom sauce. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with rice and fries.

2. Add and mix roasting for two minutes.
4. 5 water cups add warm water and a handle salt and bring it to boiling point.
5. Close the cover of the pot and leave the stove to pear.

7. Cook and strain 4 minutes in boiling water.
8. Add and mix all vegetables to the pan near to attract Bulgur water.
9. Grab the cover and leave it from the stove after cooking for two minutes.
10. After all, add and mix the Komili Suzma Olive, which is left with fine chopped parsley.
11. 11. Cut the tops of tomatoes with knives and unload them with a sweet spoon.

12. August With the help of a round mold from the Chedar cheese, cut the pieces you will use in the mouth and paste it on the top of the tomatoes.

vegetarian-coconut-curry-with-tofu.name: Vegetarian Coconut Curry With Tofu
instructions: Wrap tofu in 2 to 3 layers of paper towels and place on a plate. Place a second plate on top to encourage fluid out of the tofu. Let sit until paper towels are saturated, 3 to 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 93°C (95 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking tray.
Discard wet paper towels and cube tofu. Place on the prepared baking tray.
Bake in the preheated oven until adequately dry, about 20 minutes.
While the tofu is baking, drain pineapple chunks, reserving juice.

Combine coconut milk, liquid aminos, ginger, curry paste, chili powder, curry powder, and garlic in a large skillet over medium heat. Add reserved pineapple juice and bring to a boil. Reduce temperature to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Mix cornstarch and water together in a small bowl; add to the coconut milk mixture and whisk until slightly thickened.

Stir in basil and jalapeno; cook for 1 minute. Add bok choy, spinach, green onions, mushrooms, chile peppers, tomatoes, and pineapple chunks; stir to coat. Cook over medium heat until vegetables are crisp tender, about 5 minutes.
Add tofu and stir to coat. Season with salt. Transfer to a covered dish for 10 minutes to let flavors mix, or serve immediately.

vinegar-olives-argiro.name: Vinegar Olives
instructions: Place the olives in a large bowl or bowl, rinse and discard the water.
Add new, clean water to the spot that covers them.
Change this water every two days for olives vinegar (the total duration of this process is 10 days). That's how they pop.
